    Cloud Evidence Ingress
    
                            Drop-zone mode
                        
    
                        
    
                            OneDrive and Google Drive are artifact lanes only. SCYTHE pulls captures locally, hashes them, materializes through WriteBus, then emits replayable Hypergraph Bundles.
                        
    
                        
    
                            Configure Storage Lanes
                            
    
                                FusionAuth-style auth settings use host/client/API-key references. Secrets stay server-side; this form stores lane policy and credential references only.
